session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: I just adopted a golden retriever named Max.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: That's great! How old is Max?

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: Max is two years old and loves the park.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: We moved to Seattle last month for my new job.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: I'm a data engineer at a climate startup now.

qa.question: What is the name of Alice's dog?
